name: Stage 1
description: Factory-recommended tune at Black Pearl/Overland HO level (~+12.5% torque, ~+25% power; equivalent to 450 Nm / 204 PS). Mechanically identical to stock - same turbo, injectors and rail pump - tuned within Mercedes-validated parameters. Hardware-safe for daily and long-distance use.

edits.comment: Peak torque band (1700-2500 rpm). Targets 8500 raw cap (~453 Nm) - matches Mercedes Black Pearl HO peak torque (450 Nm). Cells 4-7 already saturate, cell 8 lifts to 8040.
Mid-upper RPM (2700-3300 rpm). +13% on shoulder of torque curve; helps mid-RPM acceleration without overstressing turbo.
Upper RPM (3500-4100 rpm). +10% only - real torque here is set by injection/turbo maps; limiter only sets the ceiling.
Pre-rev-limit (4300 rpm). +5% gentle lift. Cell 18 (rev-limit) untouched - keeps factory rev limiter at 4500.
+10% boost target at mid-RPM x mid-high load (rows 4-9, cols 6-11). Cap 2400 mbar absolute (~1.4 bar relative) to protect Garrett GT2052V from overspeed at high RPM.
+12% rail pressure at mid-high RPM x high load (rows 4..15, cols 9..15). Cap 13800 raw (~1380 bar) keeps within stock CP1 pump and injector spray-in window.
+18% main fueling at high RPM x high load (rows 7..15, cols 10..15). Stock injectors handle this comfortably; combined with the boost lift gives the +25% power.
+10% transient fueling at high load. Improves throttle response and reduces lag - feels like a HO.
+14% on the secondary acceleration map; matches main acceleration map ratio for consistency.

options.label: EGR off (recommended for diesels)
options.description: Software EGR delete: saturates the phase-of-injection map to its own factory ceiling. The ECU sees a flat reference and disengages EGR closed-loop control. No hardware blanking plate required. Strongly recommended for long-term engine cleanliness on diesel - prevents intake soot build-up and EGR valve sticking.

edits.comment: Flatten phase-of-injection map to its factory maximum to disengage EGR loop.
